subcodes.first_line: O servant at the Threshold of the Almighty! In such a state am I engaged in thy remembrance that neither hath the pen the power to write nor the tongue to speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه حق در حالتی بذکر تو مشغولم که نه قلم یارای تحریر دارد و نه لسان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love as fire, @pain of love; love as veil
